summary: Rejection Features testing complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Rejection Reasons CRUD page, Rejection Report page with filters and summary cards, Batch Detail rejection summary section, and inspection form with rejection reason dropdown.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and integrations verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Rejection Features fully tested. Key features: 1) Rejection Reasons Master Data at /rejection-reasons - CRUD operations with duplicate name validation (400 error). 2) Rejection Report at /rejection-report - filters (date_from, date_to, batch_id, stage_type), summary cards (Total Rejected, By Resource, By Date), detail table with totals footer. 3) Batch Detail rejection summary - collapsible section showing Resource | Date | Stage | Bottles Rejected | Reason with totals row. 4) Inspection form now has rejection reason dropdown populated from master data (appears when qty_rejected > 0). 5) Navigation: 'Rejection Reasons' and 'Rejection Report' appear in Production sidebar under PRODUCTION group.
